archimate:DataObject.name: NUTS
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: To support an effective Single Market, the Commission encourages suppliers and contracting authorities/entities to adopt best practice and use electronic communication and information technology to provide all the relevant information, so as to ensure best value for money in public procurement.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Publisher: Eurostat
Source: https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/web/regions-and-cities/overview
LOST view: SV-Agnostic Reference Data
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/NUTSDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/NUTSDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/ReferenceData

properties.value: To support an effective Single Market, the Commission encourages suppliers and contracting authorities/entities to adopt best practice and use electronic communication and information technology to provide all the relevant information, so as to ensure best value for money in public procurement.
